accelstepper_setup.message0: Create stepper motor %1 Interface type %2 Pin %3 %4 %5 %6
accelstepper_setup.tooltip: Create stepper motor objects, supporting multiple interface types

accelstepper_setup_driver.message0: Create stepper motor %1 drive mode (Step+Direction) Step pin%2 Direction pin%3
accelstepper_setup_driver.tooltip: Create a stepper motor object using driver mode (Step+Direction)

accelstepper_move_to.message0: Let stepper motor %1 move to position %2

accelstepper_move.message0: Let the stepper motor %1 move relative to %2 steps
accelstepper_move.tooltip: Relative movement specified number of steps

accelstepper_run.message0: Let the stepper motor %1 execute one step (with acceleration)
accelstepper_run.tooltip: Execute one step with acceleration/deceleration (needs to be called frequently in the loop)

accelstepper_run_speed.message0: Let the stepper motor %1 execute one step at a constant speed
accelstepper_run_speed.tooltip: Execute one step at a constant speed (needs to be called frequently in the loop)

accelstepper_stop.tooltip: Stop the motor as quickly as possible

accelstepper_set_max_speed.message0: Set the maximum speed of the stepper motor %1 to %2 steps/second

accelstepper_set_speed.message0: Set the constant speed of stepper motor %1 to %2 steps/second
accelstepper_set_speed.tooltip: Set constant speed (unit: steps/second, used in runSpeed mode)

accelstepper_get_speed.message0: Get the current speed of the stepper motor %1

accelstepper_set_acceleration.message0: Set the acceleration of stepper motor %1 to %2 steps/second²

accelstepper_get_current_position.message0: Get the current position of stepper motor %1

accelstepper_set_current_position.message0: Set the current position of the stepper motor %1 to %2
accelstepper_set_current_position.tooltip: Set the current position (for operations such as zeroing)

accelstepper_distance_to_go.message0: Get the distance from the stepper motor %1 to the target position
accelstepper_distance_to_go.tooltip: Get the distance to the target position (unit: steps)

accelstepper_is_running.tooltip: Check if the motor is running

accelstepper_enable_outputs.message0: Enable the output of stepper motor %1

accelstepper_disable_outputs.message0: Disable the output of stepper motor %1

accelstepper_run_to_position.message0: Let the stepper motor %1 run to the target position (blocked)
accelstepper_run_to_position.tooltip: Run to the target location (blocking mode, will wait until reached)

accelstepper_run_to_new_position.message0: Let the stepper motor %1 run to the new position %2 (blocked)
accelstepper_run_to_new_position.tooltip: Run to new location (blocking mode, will wait until reached)

accelstepper_run_speed_to_position.message0: Let the stepper motor %1 run at a constant speed to the target position
accelstepper_run_speed_to_position.tooltip: Run to the target position at constant speed (needs to be called frequently in the loop)

accelstepper_set_enable_pin.message0: Set the enable pin of stepper motor %1 to %2

multistepper_create.tooltip: Create a MultiStepper object that can manage up to 10 stepper motors

multistepper_add_stepper.message0: Add stepper motor %1 to multi-motor controller %2
multistepper_add_stepper.tooltip: Add a single stepper motor to a multi-motor controller

multistepper_move_to.message0: Let all motors in the multi-motor controller %1 move synchronously to position %2
multistepper_move_to.tooltip: Set the target position array {pos1, pos2, ...} of all motors, which will arrive at the same time at constant speed

multistepper_move_to_2.message0: Let the 2 motors in the multi-motor controller %1 move synchronously. Motor 1 position %2 Motor 2 position %3
multistepper_move_to_2.tooltip: Set the target position of 2 motors, suitable for dual-axis applications such as XY stages

multistepper_move_to_3.message0: Let the 3 motors in the multi-motor controller %1 move synchronously. Motor 1 position %2 Motor 2 position %3 Motor 3 position %4
multistepper_move_to_3.tooltip: Set the target position of 3 motors, suitable for three-axis applications such as XYZ platform

multistepper_move_to_4.message0: Let the 4 motors in the multi-motor controller %1 move synchronously. Motor 1 position%2 Motor 2 position%3 Motor 3 position%4 Motor 4 position%5
multistepper_move_to_4.tooltip: Set the target position of 4 motors

multistepper_run.message0: Let the multi-motor controller %1 execute a step (non-blocking)
multistepper_run.tooltip: To execute one step, it must be called frequently in the loop.

multistepper_run_speed_to_position.message0: Let the multi-motor controller %1 run to the target position (blocking)
multistepper_run_speed_to_position.tooltip: Run to the target location (blocking mode, will wait until reached)
